PAINT SETTINGS

🎨 Paint Brands

Configure available paint brands for your region (e.g., Dulux, Wattyl for Australia; Benjamin Moore, Sherwin-Williams for USA)

Available Brands:

🎨 Paint Supplier / Mixing Card Labels

Controls the supplier name and formula code labels printed on mixing cards. Evic ExpressTint is pre-configured. Select Custom to enter your own supplier's labels.

✅ Evic ExpressTint — default labels active:
Section header: TINT FORMULA - EVIC DETAILS
Formula code label: Evic Code:
To use a different supplier, select Custom / Other Supplier above.

Shown in mixing card header

Replaces "Evic Code:" on mixing card

Printed as the bold header on the mixing card formula section

📄 Mixing Card Preview:

TINT FORMULA — BC DETAILS
(Weights for 1 Litre of Paint)

BC Code: XB6930______________
Base Type: Satin White__________

🪣 Paint Coverage Rates

Set sqm per litre for each product type. Used in Reports tab to calculate litre quantities.

📦 Paint Stock Settings

Set stock alert thresholds and paint base costs for Reports profitability analysis.

Alert triggers when any base drops below this level
🔒
Pro Feature
Paint cost analysis requires the Pro plan.

Enter your cost per litre for each base. The Reports tab calculates litres used from your job SQM ÷ coverage rate — these $/L figures are then multiplied to get total paint cost. Tinter grams in your formulas are separate and not used here.

⚪ Satin
✨ Gloss
🪨 Matt
🔷 Clear
🪣 Undercoat (coloured)

Upload a PNG file for your circle logo (recommended size: 150x150px)

☁️ Logo Sync: Logos are saved to your cloud account and will appear automatically on all devices.

Upload a PNG file for your header/branding logo (recommended size: 1024x300px or similar aspect ratio)

API INTEGRATION KEYS

Third-party integrations for accounting and external services

Get a key at console.anthropic.com

⚠️ If you get quota errors: Go to Google Cloud Console → enable billing on your project. Gemini free tier is very limited without billing (even $0 spend — just needs a card linked).

👷
STAFF PIN LOGIN

Set the PIN shop staff use to log in. They will see jobs, history, database, supply docket, mixing card, labels and A3 schedule — but not admin, pricing, estimates, quotes or invoices.

Current PIN: Not set
💾
DATA BACKUP & RESTORE
LAST MANUAL BACKUP
No backup yet this session
📥 Download Full Backup

Captures all job history, clients, paint formulas, pricing, settings and company details into a single dated JSON file. Save to your external 5TB drive.

📤 Restore From Backup

Select a .json backup file. Warning: overwrites current data. A safety backup downloads automatically first.

🤖 Automated Overnight Backups

The companion script paintworkz-backup.js runs nightly on Windows/Mac, connects to Firebase, and saves 30-day rotating backups to your external 5TB drive. No browser needed.

Full setup instructions are included inside the script file.

TERMS OF SERVICE & LEGAL
PaintWorkz Pro — Terms of Service
Last updated: 4 March 2026

1. Acceptance
By accessing or using PaintWorkz Pro you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, do not use the App.

2. Ownership & Intellectual Property
PaintWorkz Pro is created and owned by Colin Bedford. All code, design, and content is the intellectual property of Colin Bedford. Unauthorised copying, reverse engineering, or redistribution is strictly prohibited.

3. Licence
A non-exclusive, non-transferable licence is granted to use the App solely for managing your painting business. This does not permit resale, sub-licensing, or redistribution of the App itself.

4. Data & Privacy
Your data is stored in your Firebase account and local device storage. The Owner does not access, sell, or share your business data. You are responsible for maintaining backups.

5. Disclaimer of Warranties
The App is provided "as is" without warranty. No guarantees are made regarding uptime, data retention, or fitness for purpose. Use at your own risk.

6. Limitation of Liability
To the maximum extent permitted by law, the Owner is not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages including data loss, business interruption, or financial loss.

7. Subscription & Payment
Where a subscription applies, access is contingent on current payment. Pricing may be modified with 30 days notice.

8. Termination
The Owner may suspend or terminate access at any time for breach of these Terms.

9. Governing Law
These Terms are governed by the laws of Victoria, Australia.

10. Contact
[email protected]

Privacy Policy (Summary)
We collect your email address for login and business data you enter (stored in Firebase under your account). We do not sell your data. Firebase (Google) is used for auth and storage. You may request deletion of your account at any time by contacting us.
🐛
BUG REPORTS & FEEDBACK

Found a bug or have a feature request? Send us a message and we'll get onto it.

🐛 Bug Report 💡 Feature Request

Include your device type and what you were doing when the issue occurred. Screenshots welcome.
